author: jsign
content:
Of course. <@402080271563751435> feel free to share with me or Han your ssh pubkey and we can give you access to the machine.
I sometimes do some long runs of benchmarks (mostly related to how many EEST benchmark tests we have), but whenever you need to try something out, you can ping in the TG group channel we have for coord, and I can pause anything I'm running for you to use, and I can resume it later.
